## Description

Brief description of the changes and the motivation behind them.

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] No `any` added without justification comment
- [ ] ADR created/updated if architectural decision was made
- [ ] Changeset added (`npx changeset`) if this affects a published package

## Self-Review Note

If you are the sole author: have you paused at least 24h before merging?
